title: Just 3D Tools
description: Change Your Defult Tools to Fancy 3D Models With This Pack.
body:
![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23a25019880c315acc125ca53855d1ee9f30631.png)
---
This pack refreshes many combat items with fancy 3D models.

There is the list of remodelled items
Swords,Axes,Pickaxes,Hoes,Shovels,Spears,Mace,Trident,Crossbow,Bow,Arrow,Firework
